message:
refactor: extract shared table utilities

- Create src/table_utils.zig with common helpers:
  - convertArray: generic type conversion for column data
  - findColumnIndex: column lookup by name
- Update arrow_table.zig, avro_table.zig, orc_table.zig, xlsx_table.zig
  to use shared utilities
- Add lanceql.table_utils module to build.zig

Removes ~50 lines of duplicated code across 4 table implementations.
